entries.source: Treat this as a stateful, evidence-aware historical simulation with a passport, travel advisory, world view, and choices.
entries.value: Phatha lokhu njengokulingisa komlando okusekelwe ebufakazini, okunephasiphothi, iseluleko sokuhamba, umbono womhlaba, nezinqumo.

entries.source: Treating a popular market as an attractive market.
Treating religion as private opinion rather than public order would sound strange and possibly dangerous.
entries.value: Ukuphatha inkolo njengombono wangasese kunokuba kube ukuhleleka komphakathi kuzozwakala kuyinqaba futhi mhlawumbe kuyingozi.

entries.source: Treats revenue growth as value growth.
entries.value: Uphatha ukukhula kwemali engenayo njengokukhula kwenani.

entries.source: Treats style as a substitute for reasoning.
entries.value: Uphatha isitayela njengendlela yokufaka esikhundleni sokucabanga.

entries.source: Trial talk travels through civic spaces
Try first: a coffee tax raises sellers' cost. What should you expect before seeing the graph?
entries.value: Zama kuqala: intela yekhofi ikhuphula izindleko zabathengisi. Yini okufanele uyilindele ngaphambi kokubona igrafu?

entries.source: Try first: a value logs as undefined right after a fetch call. What is the most useful first check?
entries.value: Zama kuqala: inani libhalwa njengelingachaziwe ngemva nje kocingo lokulanda. Yikuphi ukuhlola kokuqala okuwusizo kakhulu?

entries.source: Try first: if sales grow 20% but margins shrink and inventory needs jump, what probably happens to free cash flow?
entries.value: Zama kuqala: uma ukuthengisa kukhula ngo-20% kodwa imajini incipha nezidingo zempahla zikhuphuka, yini okungenzeka yenzeke ekuhambeni kwemali yamahhala?

entries.source: Try first: in food delivery, which force is most likely strengthened by customers comparing prices across apps?
entries.value: Zama kuqala: ekulethweni kokudla, yimaphi amandla okungenzeka kakhulu ukuthi aqiniswe amakhasimende aqhathanisa amanani kuzo zonke izinhlelo zokusebenza?

entries.source: Try first: what is better evidence that you understand a new concept?
entries.value: Zama kuqala: yibuphi ubufakazi obungcono bokuthi uyaqonda umqondo omusha?

entries.source: Try first: which sentence usually needs repair when evidence is present but the paragraph still feels unconvincing?
entries.value: Zama kuqala: yimuphi umusho ovame ukudinga ukulungiswa lapho ubufakazi bukhona kodwa indima isazizwakala ingakholisi?

entries.source: Try this frame: "When ___ changes, ___ changes because ___."
entries.value: Zama lo mklamo: "Lapho ___ ishintsha, ___ iyashintsha ngoba ___."

entries.source: Turn material into a deck you actually test yourself on.
entries.value: Phendula okokufunda kube yidekhi ozihlola ngayo ngempela.

entries.source: Turn the weak spot into a quiz, flashcards, or a follow-up chat.
entries.value: Phendula indawo ebuthakathaka ibe yimibuzo, amakhadi okukhumbula, noma ingxoxo elandelayo.

entries.source: Understand basics, solve problems, revise fast...
entries.value: Qonda izisekelo, xazulula izinkinga, buyekeza ngokushesha...

entries.source: Understand photosynthesis, write an essay plan...
Understanding means you can predict, explain, and use an idea in a new situation. Reading is only the start.
entries.value: Ukuqonda kusho ukuthi ungabikezela, uchaze, futhi usebenzise umbono esimweni esisha. Ukufunda kuyisiqalo nje.

entries.source: Unresolved until the historical setting is specified.
entries.value: Akuxazululwanga kuze kube yilapho isimo somlando sicacisiwe.

entries.source: Unverified details must stay visibly uncertain
entries.value: Imininingwane engaqinisekisiwe kufanele ihlale ingaqinisekile ngokubonakalayo

entries.source: Use only as the last resort.
Use the dossier to see what incentives, fears, allies, and enemies shape the reply.
entries.value: Sebenzisa idosiye ukuze ubone ukuthi yiziphi izikhuthazo, ukwesaba, abalingani, nezitha ezibumba impendulo.

entries.source: Use visible sections: Shared artifact, AI contribution, User move, Inline comments, Decision log, Open questions, Next action.
entries.value: Sebenzisa izigaba ezibonakalayo: I-artifact eyabiwe, umnikelo we-AI, ukunyakaza komsebenzisi, amazwana angaphakathi, ilogi yesinqumo, imibuzo evulekile, isinyathelo esilandelayo.

entries.source: User's purpose: help them choose sharp opening questions.
entries.value: Inhloso yomsebenzisi: bancede bakhethe imibuzo evulekile ebukhali.

entries.source: Value = forecast free cash flows discounted for risk + discounted terminal value.
entries.value: Inani = ukubikezela ukuhamba kwemali kwamahhala okudonselwe ubungozi + inani lokugcina elidonselwe phansi.

entries.source: West Market during the Tang dynasty
Wet dust, shouted rumors, smoke, prayer calls, and the metallic anxiety of a city under pressure.
entries.value: Uthuli olumanzi, amahemuhemu amemeziwe, intuthu, izingcingo zomthandazo, nokukhathazeka okungathi sína kwedolobha elingaphansi kwengcindezi.

entries.source: What are we trying to build, solve, learn, or improve?
entries.value: Yini esizama ukuyakha, ukuyixazulula, ukuyifunda, noma ukuyithuthukisa?

entries.source: What do you want to ask, test, learn, or confront?
entries.value: Yini ofuna ukuyibuza, ukuyihlola, ukuyifunda, noma ukubhekana nayo?

entries.source: What do you want to understand or be able to do?
entries.value: Yini ofuna ukuyiqonda noma ukukwazi ukuyenza?

entries.source: What kind of journey is this?
What they value, defend, miss, or refuse.
entries.value: Lokho abakwazisayo, abakuvikelayo, abakukhumbulayo, noma abakwenqabayo.

entries.source: What would you like to be quizzed on today?
Where and when do you want to go?
Whether one encounter changes a crowd's direction
entries.value: Ukuthi ukuhlangana okukodwa kushintsha yini indlela yesixuku

entries.source: Who pressures them, supports them, or threatens them.
Write a 4 sentence paragraph with a claim, evidence, explanation, and consequence.
entries.value: Bhala indima enemisho emi-4 enesimangalo, ubufakazi, incazelo, kanye nomphumela.

entries.source: Write a short answer. The app checks the link, not polish.
entries.value: Bhala impendulo emfushane. Uhlelo lokusebenza luhlola isixhumanisi, hhayi ukucwengwa.

entries.source: Write the core link in one sentence before moving on.
entries.value: Bhala isixhumanisi esiyinhloko emushweni owodwa ngaphambi kokuqhubeka.

entries.source: Write your answer, even if it is rough.
entries.value: Bhala impendulo yakho, noma ngabe ayilungiswanga kahle.

entries.source: Yes. Evidence needs interpretation or the argument feels unfinished.
entries.value: Yebo. Ubufakazi budinga ukuhunyushwa kungenjalo impikiswano izwakala ingaphelele.

entries.source: Yes. You connected sales, margins, and working capital instead of treating one line as the whole model.
entries.value: Yebo. Uxhume ukuthengisa, imajini, kanye nemali esebenzayo esikhundleni sokuphatha umugqa owodwa njengemodeli ephelele.

entries.source: You add ideas first so the buddy can build with you.
entries.value: Wengeza imibono kuqala ukuze umngane akwazi ukwakha nawe.

entries.source: You can recognize the definition when it appears.
You can use it correctly in a new example.
You gave enough of the causal link to move forward.
entries.value: Unikeze isixhumanisi esanele sokubangela ukuze uqhubekele phambili.

entries.source: You have a starting map now. Let us rebuild the weak spots.
entries.value: Manje usunemephu yokuqala. Masiphinde sakhe izindawo ezibuthakathaka.

entries.source: You have evidence for this step. Use Continue to move ahead.
entries.value: Unobufakazi balesi sinyathelo. Sebenzisa u-Continue ukuze uqhubekele phambili.

entries.source: You named a changed input and connected it to the result. That is the move we are training.
entries.value: Uqambe okokufaka okushintshiwe futhi wakuxhumanisa nomphumela. Lowo umnyakazo esiwuqeqeshayo.

entries.source: You read three explanations about it.
Your answer controls the next question.
Your answer needs a clearer because-link: what changed, what it affected, and why.
entries.value: Impendulo yakho idinga isixhumanisi esicacile sokuthi 'ngoba': yini eshintshile, yini eyithintile, nokuthi kungani.

entries.source: Your buddy works beside you: you contribute ideas, the app organizes them, and both of you checkpoint progress.
entries.value: Umngane wakho usebenza eceleni kwakho: unikeza imibono, uhlelo lokusebenza luyayihlela, futhi nobabili nihlola inqubekelaphambili.

entries.source: Your status controls language, money, access, danger, and what questions sound natural.
entries.value: Isimo sakho silawula ulimi, imali, ukufinyelela, ingozi, nokuthi imiphi imibuzo ezwakala njengemvelo.
Izincazelo ezicacile zanoma yikuphi okufisayo ukukwazi

entries.source: Curious about absolutely anything? Ask, explore, and go deeper at your pace. Your buddy makes ideas practical, memorable, and easy to build on. Try: "Explain how the stock market actually works."
entries.value: Unelukuluku lokwazi noma yini? Buza, hlola, futhi ujule ngejubane lakho. Umngane wakho wenza imibono ibe nenzuzo, ikhumbuleke, futhi kube lula ukwakha phezu kwayo. Zama: "Chaza ukuthi imakethe yamasheya isebenza kanjani ngempela."

entries.source: What are you curious about today?
Ask any question and learn through clear explanations, examples, follow-up prompts, and patient AI tutoring.
entries.value: Buza noma yimuphi umbuzo futhi ufunde ngezincazelo ezicacile, izibonelo, imiyalo elandelayo, kanye nokufundiswa okubekezelayo kwe-AI.

entries.source: Curious learners, students, parents, and self-taught builders who want a friendly place to start.
entries.value: Abafundi abaneluphi, abafundi, abazali, kanye nabazifundisayo abafuna indawo enobungane yokuqala.

entries.source: Instead of dropping a long answer, inspir helps you choose a simpler foundation, a deeper route, or a practical example.
entries.value: Esikhundleni sokunikeza impendulo ende, i-inspir ikusiza ukuba ukhethe isisekelo esilula, indlela ejulile, noma isibonelo esisebenzisekayo.

entries.source: Leave with a useful next question
A guided reasoning chamber for disciplined questioning
entries.value: Igumbi lokuqeqesha ukucabanga eliqondisiwe lemibuzo eyenziwe ngokuqondile

entries.source: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: Guqula umqondo, impikiswano, inkinga, umbhalo, noma isinqumo sibe uchungechunge lwemibuzo egxilile. Umngane wakho ulalela impendulo ngayinye, ahlaziye imibono kanye nezikhala, futhi akuqhubele ekuphethweni kwakho kokugcina. Zama lokhu: "Ngisize ngiqonde izindleko zethuba (opportunity cost)."

entries.source: Answer the active question in your own words
Learn through focused questions, hints, and reflection instead of passive answer reading.
entries.value: Funda ngemibuzo egxilile, amacebo, nokuzindla esikhundleni sokufunda izimpendulo nje.

entries.source: Learners who want to think through a topic, test assumptions, and build durable understanding.
entries.value: Abafundi abafuna ukucabanga ngesihloko, bavivinye imibono, futhi bakhe ukuqonda okuhlala njalo.

entries.source: The tutor asks one question at a time, waits for your reasoning, and synthesizes only after you have tried.
entries.value: Umfundisi ubuza umbuzo owodwa ngesikhathi, alinde ukucabanga kwakho, futhi ahlanganise konke kuphela ngemva kokuba uzamile.

entries.source: Turn confusion into a clearer model
Should a company enter this market?
entries.value: Ingabe inkampani kufanele ingene kule makethe?

entries.source: Build, critique, and learn in a shared workroom
entries.value: Yakha, gxeka, futhi ufunde egumbini lokusebenzela elabiwe

entries.source: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Vula indawo yokusebenzela eyabiweyo nomsebenzisani we-AI. Dala okuthile okuyisisekelo, shintshanani ngokuhlela, phikisani izindawo ezibuthakathaka, bhalani izinqumo, futhi nihambe nithuthukile ngempela.

entries.source: Add your next edit, decision, question, or handoff
entries.value: Engeza ukuhlela kwakho okulandelayo, isinqumo, umbuzo, noma ukudlulisela

entries.source: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Vula indawo yokusebenzela eyabiweyo nomsebenzisani we-AI. Dala okuthile okuyisisekelo, shintshanani ngokuhlela, phikisani izindawo ezibuthakathaka, bhalani izinqumo, futhi nihambe nithuthukile ngempela.

entries.source: Learners exploring foundations topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Abafundi abahlola izihloko zezisekelo abafuna isiqondiso esisebenzayo esikhundleni sebhokisi lezimpendulo elijwayelekile.

entries.source: This mode is tuned for collaborative instruction with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Le modi ilungiselelwe imiyalelo yokubambisana ngemiyalo yayo, izibonelo, nokugeleza kokufunda.

entries.source: Build, critique, and learn in a shared workroom
entries.value: Yakha, gxeka, futhi ufunde endaweni yokusebenzela eyabiweyo

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal
Build a photosynthesis explanation with me
Adaptive lessons that make you do

Learn by doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery. The app builds a live lesson canvas around your goal instead of turning instruction into a long chat. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."
entries.value: Funda ngokwenza, ukubona, ukuqhathanisa, ukulungisa, nokufakazela ukwazi kahle. Uhlelo lokusebenza lwakha ikhanvasi yesifundo esibukhoma mayelana nenjongo yakho esikhundleni sokuphendula imiyalelo ibe yingxoxo ende. Zama: "Ngifundise ukwenza imodeli yezezimali."

entries.source: What would you like to learn today?
Learn by doing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery with an AI tutor that turns your goal into an active lesson.
entries.value: Funda ngokwenza, ukuqhathanisa, ukulungisa, nokufakazela ukwazi kahle nomfundisi we-AI ophendula injongo yakho ibe yisifundo esisebenzayo.

entries.source: Learners who want a guided lesson canvas with examples, checks, and active practice instead of a long chat answer.
entries.value: Abafundi abafuna ikhanvasi yesifundo eqondisiwe enezibonelo, ukuhlola, nokuzijwayeza okusebenzayo esikhundleni sengxoxo ende.

entries.source: The mode keeps the session interactive, moving between explanation, try-it steps, checks, and repairs.
entries.value: Le modi igcina iseshini isebenzisana, ihamba phakathi kwencazelo, izinyathelo zokuzama, ukuhlola, nokulungisa.

entries.source: Help me learn supply and demand
entries.value: Ngisize ufunde mayelana nokunikezwa kanye nesidingo

entries.source: 10 MCQs on any topic with a score
entries.value: Imibuzo eyi-10 yokukhetha impendulo efanele kunoma yisiphi isihloko enesikolo

entries.source: Pick any topic and face a focused 10-question multiple-choice quiz. You answer one question at a time, get instant feedback, and finish with a score and review.
entries.value: Khetha noma yisiphi isihloko bese ubhekana nemibuzo eyi-10 yokukhetha impendulo efanele. Uphendula umbuzo owodwa ngesikhathi, uthole impendulo ngokushesha, bese uqeda ngesikolo kanye nokubuyekeza.

entries.source: What topic shall we put you to the test on?
Generate a focused multiple-choice quiz on any subject and review explanations after each answer.
entries.value: Dala imibuzo egxilile yokukhetha impendulo efanele kunoma yisiphi isihloko futhi ubuyekeze izincazelo ngemva kwempendulo ngayinye.

entries.source: Learners who want active recall, quick practice, and a score they can improve.
entries.value: Abafundi abafuna ukukhumbula okusebenzayo, ukuzijwayeza okusheshayo, kanye nesikolo abangasithuthukisa.

entries.source: The quiz mode hides answers until you respond, then turns every miss into a review point.
entries.value: Imodi yemibuzo ifihla izimpendulo uze uphendule, bese iphendula konke okungalungile kube yiphuzu lokubuyekeza.

entries.source: Receive a temporal passport, clear a travel advisory, then explore a specific historical society through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Thola ipasi lesikhashana, susa iseluleko sokuhamba, bese uhlola umphakathi othile womlando ngokusebenzisa isigcawu, imephu, umugqa wesikhathi, abantu, imithetho, okusunguliwe, kanye nobufakazi.

entries.source: What do you do next in this world?
Build a temporal passport, clear the travel advisory, and explore a historical world through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Yakha ipasi lesikhashana, susa iseluleko sokuhamba, futhi uhlole umhlaba womlando ngokusebenzisa isigcawu, imephu, umugqa wesikhathi, abantu, imithetho, okusunguliwe, kanye nobufakazi.

entries.source: History learners who want a specific society, identity, and set of constraints rather than a generic period summary.
entries.value: Abafundi bomlando abafuna umphakathi othile, ubunikazi, kanye nesethi yemikhawulo esikhundleni sesifinyezo sesikhathi esijwayelekile.

entries.source: The journey stays anchored in state and evidence: what is known, what is reconstructed, what is speculative, and what your identity can realistically access.
entries.value: Uhambo luhlala lusekelwe esimweni kanye nobufakazi: lokho okwaziwayo, lokho okwakhiwe kabusha, lokho okucatshangelwayo, kanye nalokho ubunikazi bakho obungakwazi ukufinyelela kukho ngokoqobo.

entries.source: Step into conversation with a historical figure. Ask questions, challenge ideas, and hear the world through their era, values, and limits.
entries.value: Ngena engxoxweni nomuntu omlando. Buza imibuzo, phonsela inselelo imibono, futhi uzwe umhlaba ngesikhathi sabo, izindinganiso zabo, kanye nemikhawulo yabo.

entries.source: Which historical figure would you like to meet?
entries.value: Yimuphi umuntu omlando ongathanda ukuhlangana naye?

entries.source: Ask questions, challenge ideas, and learn history through grounded conversations with public figures from the past.
entries.value: Buza imibuzo, phonsela inselelo imibono, futhi ufunde umlando ngokuxoxa nabantu abadumile besikhathi esedlule.

entries.source: Learners who want to understand people, choices, and ideas in historical context.
entries.value: Abafundi abafuna ukuqonda abantu, izinqumo, nemibono esimweni somlando.

entries.source: The app separates in-character conversation from short context notes about records and uncertainty.
entries.value: Uhlelo lokusebenza luhlukanisa ingxoxo yomlingiswa namanothi amafushane mayelana namarekhodi nokungaqiniseki.

entries.source: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: Qamba umuntu wangempela noma oqanjiwe bese uphikisana naye nganoma yisiphi isihloko. I-AI izosebenzisa isitayela sayo somphakathi kanye nombono wayo womhlaba ngenkathi igcina impikiswano ilungile.

entries.source: Who do you want to debate, and on what?
entries.value: Ubani ofuna ukuphikisana naye, futhi ngani?

entries.source: Practice argument by debating a public or fictional personality on a topic you choose.
entries.value: Zilolonge ukuphikisana ngokubanga impikiswano nomuntu owaziwayo noma oqanjiwe ngesihloko osikhethile.

entries.source: Learners who want lively debate practice with memorable voices and fair challenge.
entries.value: Abafundi abafuna ukuzilolonga ukuphikisana okujabulisayo ngamazwi akhumbulekayo kanye nenselelo efanelekile.

entries.source: The debate uses public style and worldview without pretending to know private beliefs.
entries.value: Impikiswano isebenzisa isitayela somphakathi kanye nombono womhlaba ngaphandle kokuzenza sengathi yazi izinkolelo zangasese.

entries.source: Debate climate policy with Greta Thunberg
entries.value: Phikisana ngenqubomgomo yesimo sezulu no-Greta Thunberg

entries.source: Argue both sides and sharpen thinking
entries.value: Phikisana nhlangothi zombili futhi ucije ukucabanga

entries.source: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.
entries.value: Khetha noma yisiphi isihloko bese ubhekana ngqo empikiswaneni yangempela. Khetha uhlangothi, uthole inselelo, futhi ufunde ukwenza izimpikiswano ezingcono.

entries.source: Debate any topic, get challenged, compare claims, and learn how to make stronger arguments.
entries.value: Phikisana nganoma yisiphi isihloko, uthole inselelo, uqhathanise izimangalo, futhi ufunde ukwenza izimpikiswano eziqinile.

entries.source: Students, debaters, writers, and curious learners who want stronger reasoning.
entries.value: Abafundi, abaphikisi, abalobi, kanye nabafundi abafuna ukwazi abafuna ukucabanga okunamandla.

entries.source: The coach pushes one strong counterargument at a time and tracks the claims that matter.
entries.value: Umqeqeshi uphusha impikiswano eyodwa eqinile ngesikhathi futhi ulandelela izimangalo ezibalulekile.
